title: PT Study Tutor Entry Card & Canvas Fixes
description: Fix the three blocking UI bugs in the /tutor Studio workspace.

stories.title: Entry card renders as viewport overlay, not canvas object
Material picker shows filenames not full paths
Auto-center panels after Start Priming opens them
stories.description: When the user clicks Start Priming and panels open via the priming preset, the viewport does NOT auto-frame the newly opened panels. The user sees empty canvas or partially visible panels. After handleStartPrimingFromEntry opens the priming preset, trigger focusOpenPanels() or centerOpenPanels() with a short delay (requestAnimationFrame or setTimeout 300ms) to auto-frame the newly opened panels in the viewport.
acceptanceCriteria: After clicking Start Priming, the viewport auto-pans to show the opened panels
At least one panel has a boundingBox that intersects the visible viewport
Panels are not cut off at edges -- they are framed with padding
dev-browser verification: click Start Priming, wait 2s, check panel visibility in viewport
